creator: chris.dukes.aix@gmail.com
text:
When building multimedia/xbmc with defaults and with libbluray having java enabled, the xbmc uses the libffmpeg for part of the build and the external one pulled in from java for the rest.

Presently testing with libbluray built with out java to see if behavior continues.  It appears that it is still pulled in through another component.

Of note, multimedia/xbmc *DOES* fail with current external libffmpeg.
